attacking_style: Not a natural attacker; operates primarily as a high-altitude climbing support rider. When in GC contention, defends rather than initiates offensive moves.
team_tactics: Historically deployed as premium domestique for lead-out work on climbs, particularly for Roglič. Team controls tempo through him rather than launching him into attacks.
terrain_preference: High-altitude mountain stages where pure climbing efficiency matters. Exposed on ITT stages despite exceeding expectations when under pressure in leadership role.
vulnerability: Time trials represent clear weakness as a pure climber, though can limit losses better than expected when motivated. Lacks explosive attacking punch to distance rivals on climbs.
key_patterns: Functions as elite climbing domestique, tasked with lead-out duties for team leaders (2 observations)
Exceeds low ITT expectations under GC pressure but still vulnerable to specialist chronomen (2 observations)
Team relies on his tempo-setting rather than explosive attacks from distance (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated unexpected GC resilience at 2023 Vuelta, holding red jersey through ITT with career-best time trial performance
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11
